# SearchSkill Patch Audit

This folder mirrors the SearchSkill-specific files included in `external/SearchR1/`. It is kept for review and for applying the same changes to another Search-R1 checkout.

Key files:

- `verl/trainer/main_ppo_searchskill.py`
- `verl/utils/reward_score/searchskill.py`
- `search_r1/llm_agent/searchskill_generation.py`
- `search_r1/search/*`
- selected VERL runtime compatibility patches
